channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Turkish Airlines Flight Evacuated Safely After Landing Gear Fire in Nepal
item.description: One Turkish Airlines passenger plane wey dey carry 288 people plus 11 crew members almost turn to wahala after e catch fire immediately after landing for Tribhuvan International Airport, Kathmandu. Th...

item.title: U.S. and Nigerian forces carry out successful strike killing senior ISIS leader in Northeast Nigeria
item.description: On Saturday, U.S. Africa Command (AFRICOM) release video of one coordinated military operation wey dem do together with Nigerian forces for Northeast Nigeria. The operation na counterterrorism mission...

item.title: Record Low Temperature in Canada: −63°C Recorded in Snag, Yukon in 1947
item.description: On February 3, 1947, the small village of Snag in Yukon, Canada, experienced the coldest temperature ever officially recorded in the country and all of North America, reaching an astonishing −63°C (−8...

item.title: TMC Deploys Teams to Investigate Post-Poll Violence in West Bengal
item.description: Following the West Bengal Assembly election results, the Trinamool Congress (TMC) has reported instances of post-poll violence targeting its party workers. The party claims that over 3,000 of its memb...

item.title: Ontario couple convicted of murder and child abuse of brothers to be sentenced
item.description: A sentencing hearing is scheduled for July 3 in Milton, Ontario, for Brandy Cooney, 44, and Becky Hamber, 46, who were found guilty of murdering a 12-year-old boy and abusing his younger brother while...

item.title: Torrance York Explores Parkinson’s Through Photography
item.description: In this LensCulture interview, photographer Torrance York shares how her diagnosis with Parkinson’s disease became a catalyst for her artistic exploration. York’s project, Semaphore, uses photography ...

item.title: Sars issues final demand to Nduduzo Makhathini's company over unpaid taxes
item.description: Award-winning South African jazz musician Nduduzo Makhathini and his wife, Omagugu Makhathini, are facing a formal tax dispute after the South African Revenue Service (Sars) sent a final demand to the...

item.title: Kenya Moves to Block Movie Piracy Sites to Safeguard Local Film Industry
item.description: Kenya is stepping up efforts to protect its film industry from piracy, which has been hurting local filmmakers’ earnings and international reach. Dennis Itumbi, Head of Creative Economy and Presidenti...

item.title: 42 Pupils Abducted by Insurgents at Mussa School in Borno
item.description: Naija people don hear say Boko Haram insurgents don abduct 42 pupils for Mussa Primary and Junior Secondary School wey dey Askira-Uba Local Government, Borno State. Senator Ali Ndume wey dey represent...

item.title: Drake achieves record-breaking streaming numbers with three simultaneous album releases
item.description: On 15th May 2026, Canadian rapper Drake astonished fans by releasing three albums simultaneously: 'Iceman', 'Habibti' and 'Maid Of Honour'. While only 'Iceman' had been hinted at through a creative pr...

item.title: Implementing AI-Powered Grammar Checking and TeX Math Support in LibreOffice
item.description: Former Microsoft developer Keith Curtis shared a detailed account of his experience adding advanced features to LibreOffice, specifically an AI-powered grammar checker and support for TeX math. Drawin...

item.title: Mayon Volcano Ashfall Displaces Thousands of Students in Albay
item.description: Approximately 63,000 students in Albay have been impacted by the recent ashfall from Mayon Volcano, with Ligao City reported as the most affected area. The ashfall persisted until Friday, prompting th...

item.title: Shellfish Gathering Prohibited in Lanao del Norte and Misamis Occidental Due to Red Tide
item.description: The Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (BFAR) in Northern Mindanao has imposed a temporary ban on the gathering and consumption of shellfish from Panguil Bay in Misamis Occidental and several c...

item.title: Trump’s aggressive approach stalls negotiations with Iran amid ongoing crisis
item.description: US President Donald Trump’s return to office has been marked by a familiar approach of tough, high-stakes diplomacy, which has yielded results in areas like trade and certain military conflicts. Howev...

item.title: Manchester City Wins FA Cup Final Against Chelsea with Semenyo’s Decisive Goal
item.description: In a tightly contested FA Cup final at Wembley Stadium, Manchester City defeated Chelsea 1-0 thanks to an audacious goal from Antoine Semenyo. The Ghanaian forward, who joined City from Bournemouth in...

item.title: Nigerian and US Forces Confirm Death of ISWAP Commander Al-Muniki
item.description: The Nigerian presidency don clarify say the earlier report wey claim say Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP) leader Abu-Bilal Al-Muniki don die for 2024 no correct. The confusion come from wron...

item.title: The Relationship Journey of Eric Clapton and Pattie Boyd in the 1970s
item.description: During the 1970s, Eric Clapton and Pattie Boyd's relationship evolved from unrequited love to a high-profile marriage that captured rock history. Initially, Clapton, deeply enamored with Boyd while sh...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Hospitalised After Alleged Acid Attack by Unknown Men
item.description: A Nairobi woman, Racheal Wandeto from Mwiki, Kasarani, is in hospital after an alleged brutal attack by three masked men. Racheal had gained attention for tattooing President William Ruto’s face on he...

item.title: Teenage Rob Lowe’s Early TV Debut in ABC Sitcom ‘A New Kind of Family’
item.description: Before becoming a household name and part of the iconic 'Brat Pack,' Rob Lowe made his television debut at the age of 15 in the short-lived ABC sitcom 'A New Kind of Family' (1979–1980). In the show, ...

item.title: Addressing Hypertension in South Africa: From Awareness to Effective Control
item.description: High blood pressure is a major health threat in South Africa, contributing to strokes, heart disease, kidney failure, and premature deaths. The critical problem is not merely awareness of hypertension...
